kernel=Image
arm_64bit=1
enable_uart=1
# Full KMS: kernel drives all displays including the DSI panel
dtoverlay=vc4-kms-v3d
# Firmware must not pre-configure the display pipeline (matches RPi OS)
disable_fw_kms_setup=1
# Raspberry Pi 5-inch Touch Display 2 (ILI9881 panel, Goodix touch)
dtoverlay=vc4-kms-dsi-ili9881-5inch
# Codec Zero (I2S DAC/ADC, DA7212)
dtparam=audio=off
dtparam=i2c_arm=on
dtparam=i2s=on
dtoverlay=rpi-codeczero
# Footswitches + encoder (compiled from ardor-controls.dts)
dtoverlay=ardor-controls
